name: Diabetic Strawberry Jam
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Concentrated white grape juice (simmered down -1-1/2 cups)
1 1/2 tablespoon Unflavored gelatin (dissolved in cold water)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place berries, juices, and lemon rind in a saucepan.
2. Mash the berries slightly to release juice.
3. Heat mixture to boiling.
4. Stir in dissolved gelatin until well combined.
5. Remove from heat, skim any impurities, and pack into hot jars with hot lids.
6. Allow to cool to room temperature before storing.
Because this is stored in the freezer, you may use any airtight, leakproof freezer container for storage, even plastic containers. Tastes better if allowed to sit for a week. Freezes beautifully for up to 6 months.
